title: [CI:DOCS] Clarify which operations require root
body:
Expand the README and skopeo(1) man page to explain when root is actually needed. 
Only the `containers-storage:` and `docker-daemon:` transports involve privileged resources; for `containers-storage:`, skopeo transparently re-executes inside a user namespace when the calling user lacks the required capabilities. 
Also document the per-user authentication file used by `skopeo login`/`logout`, and note that the system trust policy and registries.d directory are read but never written by skopeo.

Closes #2489

comments.body:
> Thanks @pen-pal ! One tweak, otherwise LGTM

@TomSweeneyRedHat  made sure to include the suggestion.

> https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/LLM_POLICY.md
> 
> Please actually verify the claims (at least one is fairly clearly incorrect), and reduce the many irrelevant asides.
> 
> I don’t immediately know how much to say about the `containers-storage:` case. Users _definitely don’t care_ about “re-executes itself” but the paths / capabilities might need detailing.

@mtrmac I will add more details on the /capabalities
To clarify, I did not mean to imply “more details”; if anything, my first impression is that the documentation should be much simpler — _but_ I really didn’t investigate and I don’t know.
@pen-pal looks like you need to rebase.  Any progress on @mtrmac's comments?

> @pen-pal looks like you need to rebase. Any progress on @mtrmac's comments?

I am quite not sure what to update tbh.

any reason why it was closed @mtrmac 
i can update it if you can help me understand the needed changes?
